title: High-Throughput Transcriptomics Platform for Screening Environmental Chemicals.
author: Harrill JA Everett LJ Haggard DE Sheffield T Bundy JL Willis CM Thomas RS Shah I Judson RS
content: S-EPMC10194851 PMC10194851 High-Throughput Transcriptomics Platform for Screening Environmental Chemicals. New approach methodologies (NAMs) that efficiently provide information about chemical hazard without using whole animals are needed to accelerate the pace of chemical risk assessments
